executives.name: Bob Gallagher
executives.background: Mr. Gallagher has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of New Gold Inc.

executives.name: Gillian Davidson
executives.background: Dr. Davidson is a sustainability advisor with over 20 years of experience in the extractives sector. She was previously Head of Mining & Metals at the World Economic Forum.

executives.name: Kay Priestly
executives.background: Independent Director. Former CEO of Turquoise Hill Resources Ltd. and executive at Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Raymond Threlkeld
executives.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Rainy River Resources and held senior roles at Barrick Gold.

executives.name: Renaud Adams
executives.background: Mr. Adams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining IAMGOLD, he was President and CEO of New Gold Inc. and previously served as President and CEO of Richmont Mines Inc. until its sale to Alamos Gold in 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Gillian Davidson
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Davidson is a sustainability advisor with over 20 years of experience in the extractives sector. She was previously Head of Mining & Metals at the World Economic Forum.

board_of_directors.name: Kay Priestly
board_of_directors.background: Independent Director. Former CEO of Turquoise Hill Resources Ltd. and executive at Rio Tinto.

board_of_directors.name: Raymond Threlkeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Rainy River Resources and held senior roles at Barrick Gold.
